zh.lifeSummary: 當Joane Roscelin於大約1305年出生在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾斯皮爾斯比艾雷斯比時，她的父親Thomas Piers Roscelyn33歲，母親Mabel31歲。她於1323年7月2日與Lord John Willoughby, 2nd Baron of Eresby在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾斯皮爾斯比艾雷斯比結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1354年10月15日之後在她的家鄉，埋葬在英國林可爾史爾斯皮爾斯比艾雷斯比。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joane Roscelin于大约1305年出生在英国英格兰林可爾史爾斯皮爾斯比艾雷斯比时，她的父亲Thomas Piers Roscelyn33岁，母亲Mabel31岁。她于1323年7月2日与Lord John Willoughby, 2nd Baron of Eresby在英国英格兰林可爾史爾斯皮爾斯比艾雷斯比结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1354年10月15日之后在她的家乡，埋葬在英国林可爾史爾斯皮爾斯比艾雷斯比。

nameMeanings.name: Joane
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Old French Jo(h)anne, and so a doublet of Joan . This too was revived as a given name in its own right in the first half of the 20th century. It has to some extent been influenced by the independently formed combination Jo Anne.

variants.name: Johanne
meanings: and Norwegian feminine form of   Johan .

variants.name: Joann
meanings: From Old French Jo(h)anne, and so a doublet of Joan . This too was revived as a given name in its own right in the first half of the 20th century. It has to some extent been influenced by the independently formed combination Jo Anne.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Joane Roscelin was born about 1305, in Eresby, Spilsby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Thomas Piers Roscelyn, was 33 and her mother, Mabel, was 31. She married Lord John Willoughby, 2nd Baron of Eresby on 2 July 1323, in Eresby, Spilsby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died after 15 October 1354, in her hometown, and was buried in Eresby, Spilsby, Lincolnshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joane Roscelin est née environ 1305, à Eresby, Spilsby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Piers Roscelyn, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Mabel, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé Lord John Willoughby, 2nd Baron of Eresby le 2 juillet 1323, à Eresby, Spilsby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée après 15 octobre 1354, dans sa ville natale, et a été enterrée à Eresby, Spilsby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre.

Juli 1323 in Eresby, Spilsby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom Lord John Willoughby, 2nd Baron of Eresby geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb nach 15. Oktober 1354 in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Eresby, Spilsby, Lincolnshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joane Roscelin è nata il circa 1305 nel Eresby, Spilsby, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Thomas Piers Roscelyn, aveva 33 anni e sua madre, Mabel, aveva 31 anni. Lei sposato Lord John Willoughby, 2nd Baron of Eresby il 2 luglio 1323, nel Eresby, Spilsby, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì dopo il 15 ottobre 1354, nel sua cittadina, e fu sepolta a Eresby, Spilsby, Lincolnshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Joane Roscelinが約1305年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアスパルスビーエレスビーで生まれた時，父Thomas Piers Roscelynは33歳，母Mabelは31歳であった。1323年7月2日にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアスパルスビーエレスビーでLord John Willoughby, 2nd Baron of Eresbyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1354年10月15日以後に故郷で死去し，イギリスリンコルンシュアイアスパルスビーエレスビーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joane Roscelin(이)가 대략 1305년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 스피스비 레스비에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Piers Roscelyn(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mabel(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 1323년 7월 2일 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 스피스비 레스비에서 Lord John Willoughby, 2nd Baron of Eresby(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1354년 10월 15일 이후 그녀의 고향에서 사망했으며 영국 링코실르 스피스비 레스비에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joane Roscelin nasceu aproximadamente 1305, em Eresby, Spilsby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas Piers Roscelyn, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Mabel, tinha 31 anos. Ela casou-se com Lord John Willoughby, 2nd Baron of Eresby em 2 de julho de 1323, em Eresby, Spilsby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu após 15 de outubro de 1354, em sua cidade natal, e foi sepultada em Eresby, Spilsby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joane Roscelin родилась около 1305 г. в местности эресби, спилсби, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Thomas Piers Roscelyn было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Mabel, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Lord John Willoughby, 2nd Baron of Eresby 2 июля 1323 г. в местности эресби, спилсби, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла после 15 октябрь 1354 г. в её родном городе и была похоронена в местности эресби, спилсби, линколншир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joane Roscelin nació aproximadamente 1305, en Eresby, Spilsby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Thomas Piers Roscelyn, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Mabel, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Lord John Willoughby, 2nd Baron of Eresby el 2 de julio de 1323, en Eresby, Spilsby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió después de 15 de octubre de 1354, en su pueblo, y fue sepultada en Eresby, Spilsby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra.
